reviews.review_description:
The characters make this social world great.  Physics are outstanding.  Controls and activating worlds are better.   These world are more enjoyable.  
Once this app becomes easy to find it's quickly going to lead the way towards what people want.

I feel like this game has a really good idea. It is more or less a VR chat clone, but it has a lot more features than you would think. The only issue with it is with VR chat. You have more people playing this game doesn't even have three people playing at one point. It's very sad. I would love to see this game having more people but I don't think will ever happen. I honestly would love to see more people playing it but yeah three stars. I hope that this game grows

reviews.review_title: Better safe alternative to VR chat
reviews.review_description: I like this game so much all I would do to change. It was take away the AI art in it, and also add more characters that I can turn into from Cartoon Network
I cant play. Not working in Turkey 😔

This is absolutely amazing hours of fun and discovery 

Realy njoyed it Thankyou for making it side load 🥳👍👍👍
Not ou rking q3

This app used to be amazing. Don't get me wrong, the people and staff are simply the best, the app itself.... Well, not so much. 

Pros:
- Great Community 
- Stellar physics 
- Development meetings with Q&A

Cons:
- Extremely buggy platform connectivity.
- No world sorting or categories 
- Poor avatar selection, unless you make one.

Overall, there are some neat worlds to explore and friendly people to meet, if you are able to maintain connection and can overlook all the bugs. Good luck with everything for now Banter! I genuinely hope you pull through, perhaps I'll try it again sometime and see where things sit.

cool game graphically. this game seems to compete with social games like vr chat or even RIFF,.... YOU  have the better graphics and nice physic system...   .. but after months of this game out.... theres Absolutely nothing to do lol     ... there's like 30 worlds of nothingness... after walking around mindlessly in empty worlds smh... this game wore off in 1 day.. sorry  but its boring... unless u like to just walk 👣
It feels like a substandard VRchat clone with worlds designed by first year art school students. So the worlds are weird and artsy but not very fun.

started off good but the decline it massive only thing made it different was for adults then they did update most people on headsets could not get on they broke creators worlds repeatedly and the app was so clicky making it very unpleasant place this app is dying avoid it

I could honestly write an entire essay on why my review has changed.

- lack of new community members
- lack of updated documentation to help devs create
- we often feel let down due to ideas not being pushed
- we are often in the dark about updates (which broke worlds)
- lack of engagement with staff and community

These are many of mine and others experiences with the platform. In the over of a year being on the platform creating and helping the community grow there was a lack of gratitude for my efforts.

I would love to see the app grow and community expand like it used to when I joined where I could openly talk to staff and have a joke and not fear for being banned.
I like the platform and the worlds are cool and graphics are pretty good just a very lonely app no ones barely there.

Took me a while to find my way around and to sign in with my sidequest but got there eventually. I've explored quite a few spaces and there are many to explore. The Devs have worked hard on this and no doubt will be pushing regular updates. Get in and have a nosey. It's entertaining watching cardboard box avatars trying to figure out how to unmute themselves lol pay attention to the guides that are in there first otherwise you'll be wandering around like a zombie. Most of all..... ENJOY!!

Banter is a fantastic VR social game that brings endless fun and creativity! With its physics-driven interactions and a variety of virtual worlds to explore, it's perfect for spending quality time with friends. Whether you're building your own worlds or joining others, Banter offers a unique and engaging experience that stands out in the VR community. Highly recommend giving it a try!
Is this the next gen version of the SideQuest meta verse? What was it called? Expanse?
Constantly improving and growing, will probably become the #1 VR spot for games and hangout spaces on VR

reviews.review_title: Can't even get spatial audio right
reviews.review_description: The moment I got in the tutorial started playing, behind me, too quiet to hear what he was saying. Then, it wants you to make an account. No thanks. Your entire framework is entirely out of order and broken. Shame that I had such a terrible first impression, the only thing that matters, when others seem to enjoy this. I don't remember VRC needing to teach you how to use it before logging in.

reviews.review_title: Can not get into any events
reviews.review_description: I cannot get into any of the events that are being offered on the answer. I can see the worlds and whenever I click on it, I get an error. I went through and filed. The directions does not work for me. I have the Meta Quest 3

reviews.review_title: Simply the best social game ever
reviews.review_description:
I’ve been playing this game for almost 10 months now, and one of the things I like the best is seeing the game evolving every week, there are new features every week/month that just make the game better ! And it’s never stopping, one week you see that the objects are now synced, the week after there is a crazy backroom space better than any you saw before, two weeks after you see the voicecomms and space capacity increasing and after all this another crazy space ??!?!? And it’s never stopping, there will be the new sdk releasing soon, and it will make the creation of space much easier and give many more possibilities ( a paintball game is in construction 🤫).

We could talk about the community as well, all kind, all mature (no annoying gtag kids), all open-minded ; and the staff is an integral part of this community, you can see them very very often in the game, ask them anything they will help you, ask them to be your friend they will ! They hear what their have to say and consider it, to improve the game, to help you, to ban someone if they are being naughty !

Every time you’ll go on the game you know you’ll have a great time, with all the daily events that are schedule for every time zone, it’s hard to be bored. There is an event for everything. You like to read ? there are reading events. You like to sing ? there are karaoke events. You want to do some parkour ? there are parkour events. You would like to talk because you’re not feeling well ? THERE ARE EMOTIONAL SUPPORT EVENT. You like to talk, to dance, to act, to play ? there is an event for everything, and if there isn’t, you can make your own !

You will find everything you need in banter, and on top of that, there are a lot of giveaways happening every month, making you able to win anything between a game of your choice to a quest 3 !
come on, go check it out !
Haven't felt this welcomed and included before by others on VR. It's amazing how different it is from other VR apps. Very Impressive 👍

It's a social game, and even as a not-so-social person, I love it!
I joined back in April for some giveaway. 
It was a good app then, it's a great app now, and extra features are coming almost every week.

I still remember my first event. We were with 3 people (me, the host and the CEO) AND I still had an awesome time.
Now the discord has 6000+ members and there are concurrent events with lots of people in each of them.

The physics engine is on point. You can walk, run, jump, climb, fall, slide, crouch, ... (yes, you have legs in Banter!)
There are parkour events to teach you everything. Or you can go to a space with recordings of the parkour teacher's avatar to learn everything at your own pace.
Gorilla-tag mode (legs disappear, and you walk on your hands) is in beta and a flying mode is announced where you will have to flap your arms to fly.

You can build your own spaces with A-Frame and/or Unity and host them wherever you want (Technically, Banter is a browser and the spaces are webpages)
There is a synced YouTube player so you can watch videos together.
Banter uses ReadyPlayerMe avatars, but custom avatars are currently in beta (there are some  limitations like max 15000 triangles to make sure Banter stays performant)
You can cast your PC screen to share any content you want
There is an AI-Gallery where you can do SpeechToImage
And also Karaoke, Improv Night, Game Night (jackbox,tv) Goth Night, Dinner Party (in mixed reality for VRDesktop users), Story time (listen to people reading books), zero-gravity at the ISS, ... and MORE!

Last but not least, the community is awesome!
Everybody is friendly and practically no kids
Staff is always around, super nice and always helpful and patient.

TL;DR
You will love it!

Love that they have events that can fit any schedule, are easy to find, and you don’t need to be a part of a underground group to join. Added bonus is the people who use this app!  Everyone is so welcoming and friendly! There are big worlds to explore even if you’re a loner. Excited to see what comes next!

Excellent community. Filled with a bunch of good locations to hang out and meet people. They hold daily events and weekly giveaways whether it's a random or a scavenger hunt. Mediation or music partying. you can swing around like spiderman and explore the maps or have fun in the backroom mazes.

Banter is a standout gem in the world of social VR! Its cutting-edge physics, reminiscent of the incredible BONELAB, make every interaction within the game an absolute thrill. "Did somebody say parkour?" What truly makes Banter shine is its vast array of worlds to explore; some of them are quite honestly stunning. The community within Banter is nothing short of remarkable, and it comes partnered with an amazing Discord community that you can join to enhance the experience! The ability to create custom worlds for Banter using tools like Unity adds an exciting layer of creativity, allowing users to shape their own virtual realms and share them with others. The daily events are a blast and what I love the most! They're a mix of movie nights, games, and parties, including karaoke!, that keep the excitement going strong. Banter isn't your average social VR hub; it's a gateway to a dynamic and responsive universe that invites you to engage and explore while offering endless opportunities to forge genuine connections with memorable people.

I’m not a big fan of VR chat or games like it. I don’t really see the point in sitting around and talking, but I’m actually enjoying Banter. Here’s why:

- Physics based movement (climbing, swinging, etc) is quite fun and gives me something to do while having out. Some worlds, such as backrooms, are actually fun to explore.
- It looks decent, but more importantly: it actually performs great.

There’s definitely things to improve upon and I’m certain it won’t be for everyone, but it’s worth checking out.

I've become addicted to the community, and that's what makes a great social experience like this. Being able to drop into any of the dozens of spaces available and end up spending hours just chatting with them is truly engaging (I've been playing PC as well so triple the amount of hours it shows me as playing on Meta). The daily community events are the perfect opportunity to meet up and hang out with everyone, such fun.

I've also been diving into creating my own spaces and this in itself has become very rewarding. It's easy to get started and the community discord are keen to help and offer guidance. I'm a noob when it comes to developing games, so if I can do it I think anyone can. It's great to create something and then see the reactions of people in VR when they start exploring what you've done... it's become an obsession!

I'm looking forward to the future of Banter, I feel it has the potential to really bring the VR community together. It's still early days in it's development, things are improving every week and they're super open to feedback.

100% recommendation from me, it's the most VR I've played in one experience in years!

I really like Banter! I'm normally a really shy person, but this app has really helped me come out of my shell and helped make a lot of new friends. I've had a lot of fun with some great laughs and can't wait to have more! :)

I have tried many social apps in VR, but I can tell that this one is the best I've found. The thing is, the staff is attempting something that none of the other social app platforms have had the courage to do!
Spaces are already awesome, and they are expanding rapidly, as anyone can create spaces. The people are fantastic—truly! The staff is the best I could imagine, and you can meet with them every day, especially at events. They organize a lot of events!
Long story short, give it a couple of days, try it, and you won't want to try anything else.

I've tried all the social VR apps and none of them has felt as rewarding to use as Banter. The community has been great for all time I've seen in there, nothing but positive interactions and good people. The events the moderators hosts are also another highlight with a wide variety of stuff. I highly recommend it!
Been using this app for about 4 months now and I have to say it’s the most comforting and helpful community and I love them all
I'm having a blast on here. Great community and  the physics make alot of fun things possible. A lot of new worlds added all the time with tons to explore.

This app is still in the early testing phase before full release and it already has the hall marks of a great social VR experience for users & world creators.  Many of the current worlds are amazing quality and feel like a AAA experience - I recommend Slip Stream Island and Winter Resort as the slides are so much fun.  The physics are definitely like Boneworks and feel more evolved than any other social app I have played so it means your avatar can do more cool interactive stuff!  Ready Player Me avatars mean more choice/ style - oh and the avatars have legs!   

I highly recommend joining the Banter Discord so you can see when events are running - the team do tours and other fun stuff almost every day.   The dev team are super helpful and really care about community so please support them.

I just discovered this! Really enjoyed exploring and because it’s quiet, I didn’t feel worried or pressured into any conversations.  I was literally singing karaoke on the beach to myself! Loved the whole experience! I stupidly screamed very loudly,  when the gorilla came out of nowhere! Other than that, I had a lovely peaceful adventure! 🥳 can’t wait to tell more of my VR friends about this!

reviews.review_title: Love it, and the people are great
reviews.review_description: A great social world just to jump in and have fun. The community is really nice and helpful as well. Just met a really kind guy on Slipstream Island who explained many mechanics to me. Shout out to Bob*****! The climbing and the hidden areas really make a difference. One of the best fun social sandboxes to explore (or watch a 3D movie in!). Following this one for sure!
It`s a copy of the real VRChat, there is no people around, just 5-6 people wich 2 of them are the admin`s. Alot of bugs can be find in the game, not a good experience. I prefer the real VRChat

developer_response.body: Ah well if you want VRChat then its best to go and play VRChat then! We'll still be having fun over in Banter!

reviews.review_description: Banter is truly one of the most enjoyable VR social experiences out there! What really sets it apart is the advanced physics engine - if you've played Bonelab you'll know what I'm talking about. Every worlds interacts with your avatar in really cool ways! There are worlds with customizable gravity, or even zero gravity like ISS, in some worlds you can grab and toss your friends around, and lots of other cool stuff. Some of the worlds are really enormous and pack tons of secrets and quirks. And it's just launched! I can't wait to see all what other features will be added to this app soon and explore other worlds that people will create.

I think a big appeal for this game is that it's a Quest game first, not a ported PCVR title. Can definitely help for someone on Quest looking to enjoy everything the platform has to offer. 

The physics are a real stand-out feature for the title. If someone asks me why I'd play this over other social VR titles, the physics would be why. While it's an option in some games like VRChat, this native experience is pretty much a default for most worlds. Really changes things. 

The game is pretty new right now and there's definitely more that can be added and worked on, but for now if you're looking to a nice alternative to AltSpace with a passionate team behind it, I'd say place your chips here.

reviews.review_title: A Social VR Platform That Delivers
reviews.review_description:
I recently had the pleasure of exploring Banter, a social VR platform that genuinely stands out from the crowd. Created by the brilliant minds behind SideQuest, Banter is an actively developed platform that focuses on fostering a strong sense of community among its users.

What makes Banter truly special is its community-driven approach. The developers actively listen to feedback from users, ensuring that the platform is built by and for the world builders themselves. This inclusive and collaborative environment has led to an engaging, diverse, and ever-growing collection of experiences that cater to a wide range of interests.

One of the key strengths of Banter is its use of A-Frame, which simplifies the process of building interactive VR experiences. This user-friendly technology empowers even those with little technical background to create their own virtual worlds with ease. As a result, Banter offers a plethora of unique and immersive experiences, which are continuously expanding as more creators join the platform.

banter is awesome  for anyone  h
who knows  how to code or not and there is awesome  worlds and games to play and the community  in banter  is very friendly  and helpful  if you made a world and you need help you will get fast help right  away or need support  there is a person  awesome  to help

This app is awesome for both players and world builders, as you can utilize the growing Unity Banter SDK to quickly convert your unity scenes into shareable and explorable worlds for Banter. You can also jump into various worlds via the featured spaces menu and start chatting with cool people!
This might be the future of social gaming... Move over Rec room banters here

In a nutshell, this an open multiplayer sandbox with a similar player /control system to BONEWORKS and Bonelab. 

Make levels in what ever 3d software you like, import the glb/gltf files to glitch using the templetes from the Banter SDK docs. 

https://github.com/SideQuestVR/Banter 

You can even build or 'remix' existing levels straight from glitch.com (or anyplace you can place HTML and link to it through a URL) in a browser using just A-Frame, with the addition of extra components (all referenced in the GitHub docs) like 'sq-collider', 'sq-climbable', 'sq-gravityfield' and so on, you can build anything. No unity or Blender is needed!

It has 'Ready player me' avatar support with IK, linked from your SideQuest avatar.  https://sidequestvr.com/account/edit-avatar 

An example of a few things I've managed to make in the short time I've been building. A sonic inspired race track in an half tube collecting rings, an inception hallway with zero g, a climbing park, the matrix construct with the chairs and tv (that plays video), and finally a black hold that sucks you in. Non of it was made with Unity or Blender. 

The BONEWORKS style player controller system is the Cherry on the cake for me. 

#Lavagang
So far, so good. It’s the best of social VR colliding with a cacophony of bone stuff and going places unbeknownst to anyone except the devilish devs. Could be exciting!
Really good!

With the way the team is going road-map wise... I believe this will be the best quest 2 standalone app to access social vr, live events and roam around amazing user-generated spaces. You can develop them using AFRAME & Unity (Web-hosted content using glitch.me) Desktop and PCVR will be supported soon

reviews.review_title: A Social platform for a mature audience
reviews.review_description: It’s been said Banter is VRChat meets Boneworks, but I say it’s a Social VR platform for a mature audience.

If your looking for a fast growing social app with great community, proper give aways all the time including q3 headsets and games!!  
Great events page with events everyday, great worlds to explore. This app will surprise you so give it a try!!

Banter has been a whimsical social app bursting with awesome events and fantastic people! it's still growing, but It can be a go-to spot to be my self and have fun the way I want to!  Diving into a world of exciting events where you can learn cool new skills, get some peer support, or just enjoy some good old-fashioned fun.

It has a super friendly community is all about the grown-up vibes, which is just what i needed. Whether you're on PC or VR, Banter is here to add the virtual social life.

Jump in and say hello! I'm Capt'nDan.
A place in VR where everyone is accepted and fun is never ending!!!

reviews.review_title: Best social app with peer support!
reviews.review_description: Banter is an amazing app with a wonderful community and a dev team that's outa this world. High five to the CEO for an amazing job well done. 💯🥰👍

reviews.review_title: Love the fact it's community driven
reviews.review_description: Think of this as an open world VR social game with portals to loads of cool worlds created by the community behind it. There's already some really good ones on there, but I look forward to seeing more as it gets added to! My favourite world at the moment is the ski resort, mainly because of the different ice slides

I love banter and the community that’s in it-there’s an awesome backrooms experience to explore for hours, sports, movies, social and more! You can build worlds to share and there’s always cool events happening. The Devs also love feedback and work on anything that people think need improving/adding to the app. Can’t wait to see what else pops up in the banter-verse!
The game was rapid
I love the freedom the app provides, the movements feel very natural. The community is very helpful and welcoming. Definitely my go to social app.
Great people that don't get on my nerves.

I would love to experience this app as it sounds very fun. Unfortunately it will not load for me when I try open the app. It’s stuck on a screen that says loading a live space. I’ve been trying all day to get in. Is anyone else experiencing this?

developer_response.body: Hi, we havent had any reports of this, but thats not to say you arent experiencing an issue. Can you submit a ticket over here and we will try to figure it out for you? - https://sdq.st/banter-help

reviews.review_title: Lots of fun and an amazing community
reviews.review_description:
I have had way more fun than I would have ever expected before jumping into banter, I love being a part of the community and watching it grow 
All the amazing developments from the sidequest team constantly surprising us with the possibilities 
Looking forward to spending many more hours in banter

I'm super excited to really dive in as a user, but I can't seem to link to my sidequest account within the headset. It gives the code, I put it in and press link, I'm linked, and then in the headset it says, "FAILED: Device code has expired". First off, trying to do this within the very short time it gives, you're trying to do this between your pc and the headset, there should be more time given. BUT, even when I nailed it, it didn't work. What am I doing wrong? I watched the tutorials on youtube, and it just won't work. I've been through a lot of the worlds, I love them, but I'd like to stop being a robot ball with hands. HELP!

developer_response.body:
Hi there! So sorry your having trouble! The code should last 30 mins. I think this could be happening if the time is wrong on your device. Maybe check the clock and see if its correct? 

Happy to help on discord too: https://discord.gg/bantaverse

reviews.review_description: It's like AltSpace. 😍

It's not VRC or Neos, it's something new and different, another niche that's doing it's own thing. It's growing a great community of it's own.

Banter/SideQuest staff stay super busy with regular in-game events to maintain player engagement and retention.

 It's still pretty early/there's not a lot here yet but I can see the potential for growth in short time.
